$schema.description: JSON Schema reference used by editors.

provider.description: AI provider used to generate commit suggestions.

model.description: AI model name used by the selected provider.

language.description: Default language for generated commit messages.

maxSubjectLength.description: Maximum length for generated commit subjects.

allowEmoji.description: Allow gitmoji-style emoji prefixes in generated commit messages.

confirmBeforeCommit.description: Ask for confirmation before creating a commit.

confirmBeforePush.description: Ask for confirmation before pushing after a commit.

groqApiKey.description: Groq API key. Prefer environment variables or user config; avoid committing secrets.

onboardingComplete.description: Whether the interactive setup has completed.

rules.description: Additional project or user rules injected into the commit prompt.

forbiddenPatterns.description: Words or patterns that generated commits should avoid.

fewShotExamples.description: Examples of preferred commit style injected into the prompt.

summary.description: Short description of the change represented by the example.
